purpose: Defines how GPTOPT represents each supported game without hardcoding the entire product around one title.

profileContract.id: string, stable profile id such as halo.infinite or valorant
launchers: steam, xbox, battle.net, epic, riot, standalone

configFiles.format: json, ini, cfg, xml, registry, unknown

displayBaseline.refreshPolicy: highest stable refresh unless profile overrides

conflictRules: Do not stack multiple FPS caps unless intentionally testing.

inputBaseline.sensitivityPolicy: do not blindly copy pro settings; test and track feel

blockedDuringTelemetry: duplicate capture/telemetry tools unless intentionally testing

steps.name: plain language drill name
steps.goal: what the player should feel or improve

reviewQuestions: short post-session prompts used to improve the recommendation model
safetyRules: Every write action must declare risk, backup, undo path, admin requirement, and reboot requirement.

defaultProfiles.knownBaseline: 4K 240 Hz, RTSS 240, Halo config 3840x2160, scale 100, VSync off, min/target 960, controller-first testing

defaultProfiles.role: fallback profile for games without a dedicated profile yet
defaultProfiles.knownBaseline: Use universal PC checks, detect executable, avoid unsafe config writes until a profile exists.

steps.name: Confirm input device
steps.goal: Use the intended controller or mouse without duplicate virtual devices.
steps.stopCondition: Input is detected and feels normal.

steps.name: Confirm audio route
steps.goal: Hear game and voice chat through the intended device.
steps.stopCondition: Game and voice audio are clear.

steps.name: Run movement warmup
steps.goal: Bring movement timing up to session speed.

steps.name: Run aim warmup
steps.goal: Settle tracking and precision before ranked play.
steps.stopCondition: Aim feels controlled instead of forced.

steps.name: Play one low-stress match
steps.goal: Validate the full setup under normal gameplay.
steps.stopCondition: No setup issue distracts from play.
